bead.title: Sidecar attachment storage for closed-bead events (ADR-004 step 3)
bead.description:
Implement attachment sidecar storage at .ddx/attachments/<bead-id>/events.jsonl. The bead record in beads-archive carries a reference (preserved-extra field, e.g. 'attachments': {'events': '<relative-path>'}) instead of an inline events array, so the archive row stays small. ddx bead show lazy-loads events from the sidecar when present and merges them into the displayed history. Active beads keep events inline (no behavior change) — the move to sidecar only happens when a bead is archived (handled in the archive-command bead).

References: ADR-004 §Attachment Model. Depends on ddx-2f453147.
bead.acceptance: 1. New attachment helper API in cli/internal/bead reads/writes .ddx/attachments/<bead-id>/events.jsonl. 2. Bead schema preserves an 'attachments' extras field round-trip without losing it. 3. ddx bead show <id> displays events sourced from the sidecar when the bead row uses an attachment reference, identically to inline-events display. 4. schema_compat_test.go still green; bd/br round-trip preserves the attachments extra. 5. Tests cover sidecar read, missing-sidecar fallback, and round-trip preservation.
